delivered: AC1 — committed seed: findFirstNonTerminal reads committed state via oracle.ReadSliceStatus (not slices[0] unconditionally)
AC2 — implemented is non-terminal: router.IsTerminal("implemented") returns false; findFirstNonTerminal seeds at the implemented slice (proved by TestFindFirstNonTerminalCommitted)

AC5 — single terminal-set: router.IsTerminal exported, consumed by both router (router.go) and scheduler (findFirstNonTerminal); no second definition (proved by TestFindFirstNonTerminalIsTerminalImport + TestIsTerminal covering 9 cases)
AC6 — --resume observable contract: flag added to cmd/sworn/run.go; --resume without --parallel exits 64; help text states every --parallel run seeds from committed state
